name: Fickle
description: Cannot perform the same ability in consecutive rounds of combat

name: Selfish
description: Cannot trade items. Must keep all items they personally draw.

name: Fearful
description: At the start of your turn, if adjacent to an enemy that no other players are adjacent to, you may not take actions this turn. (You may still move.)

name: Disorganized
description: When attempting to use an item during combat, shuffle all items and draw one randomly, if a consumable is drawn, it is used. Otherwise, the attempt is wasted.

name: Cursed
description: Rolling a 2 on a d20 is now also a critical failure.

name: Haunted
description: When a Flaw check is made, this character draws from the Deck of Many Things. This includes the Flaw check that inflicts Haunted on the character.

name: Curious
description: When this character or the entire party draws any number of cards from the Item deck, this character draws from the Deck of Many Things.

name: Shaky
description: If the character has taken damage earlier in this round, they must make a DC 15 Con save at the start of their turn or they cannot use any limited use abilities.

name: Lazy
description: -10 Speed, -5 Initiative

name: Hesitant
description: Cannot critically succeed, although results of 20 still count as successful hits.

name: Overconfident
description: -2 AC. May draw threat from sentient enemies with their boasting.

name: Triggerhappy
description: Uses abilities and consumables as soon as they become applicable to use, even if it's not advantageous. Does not include abilities that would kill this character.

name: Unlucky
description: -2 to all investigate checks, 50% chance you do not find loot

name: Smelly
description: -2 to all stealth checks due to your strong odor

name: Clumsy
description: -2 to all Dexterity based checks

name: Claustrophobic
description: -5 to initiative and -2 to all attack rolls when in a space smaller that 15' wide

name: Bystander
description: Refuses to act on the first round of initiative in every encounter

name: Irresponsible
description: 50% chance per encounter that one of your items goes missing

name: Gullible
description: Automatically fail opposed persuasion or deception checks

name: Overprotective
description: Choose another party member, you will do anything in your power to preserve their life including giving up your own.
